outputs.description: The relative resource name of this finding. GoogleCloudSCC.Finding.parent The relative resource name of the source the finding belongs to.
outputs.name: GoogleCloudSCC.Finding.name

outputs.description: For findings on Google Cloud resources, the full resource name of the Google Cloud resource this finding is for. GoogleCloudSCC.Finding.state The state of the finding.
outputs.name: GoogleCloudSCC.Finding.resourceName

outputs.description: The additional taxonomy group within findings from a given source. GoogleCloudSCC.Finding.externalUri The URI that, if available, points to a web page outside of Security Command Center where additional information about the finding can be found.
outputs.name: GoogleCloudSCC.Finding.category

outputs.description: The time at which the finding was created in Security Command Center. GoogleCloudSCC.Finding.eventTime The time at which the event took place, or when an update to the finding occurred.
outputs.name: GoogleCloudSCC.Finding.createTime

outputs.description: Source specific properties. These properties are managed by the source that writes the finding. Properties are varying from finding to finding. GoogleCloudSCC.Finding.severity Severity of the finding.
outputs.name: GoogleCloudSCC.Finding.sourceProperties

outputs.description: The relative resource name of the SecurityMarks. GoogleCloudSCC.Finding.securityMarks.marks Mutable user specified security marks belonging to the parent resource.
outputs.name: GoogleCloudSCC.Finding.securityMarks.name
